_comment: Central registry of platform-specific region/location filter IDs for all job crawling platforms. Each platform has its own ID scheme — this file maps canton codes to those IDs. Used by crawler scripts to filter jobs by canton. Maintained manually + scripts/discover-prospective-regions.mjs for Prospective.

prospective._comment: Prospective.ch ATS — JSON API mediums and HTML Career Centers

m1000624.name: Confederazione / VTG
m1000624.note: Macro-regions. Romandie includes VS+VD+GE+NE+FR+JU — needs post-filtering

workday._comment: Workday ATS — appliedFacets in POST body. Facet IDs are UUIDs unique per tenant.

juliusbaer.wd3.name: Julius Bär
juliusbaer.wd3.note: Auto-discovered facet ID. Expand by querying facets endpoint.

migros._comment: Migros Group careers portal — URL parameter REGION=

migros.name: Migros / Denner
migros.note: TI = 'Svizzera meridionale'. GR = 'Grigioni'. Discover via dropdown on listing page.

umantis._comment: Umantis/Abacus ATS — POST form with region ID

allianz.name: Allianz Suisse
allianz.discoveryMethod: Scrape region dropdown from listing page

successFactors._comment: SAP SuccessFactors / NES — keyword-based location search
successFactors.note: Keyword-based — add VS city/canton names to searchTerms to expand

abb.name: ABB
abb.note: Add VS terms: valais, wallis, sion, brig, visp, martigny

lidl.name: Lidl Schweiz
lidl.filterMethod: Geo bounding box: midpoint_name, min_lat, max_lat, min_lng, max_lng

login.name: login.org
login.note: Discover VS canton ID via dropdown on search page

smartrecruiters._comment: SmartRecruiters public postings API — no per-canton filter; we paginate `https://api.smartrecruiters.com/v1/companies/{Company}/postings?limit=100&offset=N` and filter Swiss postings client-side via `location.country.code === 'ch'` (fallback: isTargetSwissLocation against `location.fullLocation`). The {Company} path segment is the SmartRecruiters tenant slug shown on jobs.smartrecruiters.com/{Company}.

schindler.name: Schindler
schindler.note: First SmartRecruiters tenant onboarded (Cathedral Phase 2 Wave C Batch 2). Pagination loop now lives in scripts/lib/ats-clients/smartrecruiters-client.mjs (Cathedral Phase 3 T3.1).

migros-hq.name: Migros HQ Zürich
migros-hq.note: Parent-group SR tenant aggregating Migros Industrie, MGB, Denner, Migros Bank, Galaxus etc. Scoped to ZH-only via options.filter; uses options.fetchDetail=true with concurrency=5 to enrich jobAd payloads.
